  "findings": [
    "Corrugated Stainless Steel Tubing (CSST) gas piping is not bonded to the electrical grounding system",
    "Missing bonding jumper from the CSST gas piping system to the electrical service equipment grounding electrode system"
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Install an appropriately sized copper bonding jumper from the CSST gas piping system to the electrical grounding electrode system",
    "Ensure the bonding connection is made on the metallic pipe or fitting before the CSST, in accordance with manufacturer instructions and code requirements"
  ],
  "rationale": "CSST gas piping systems must be bonded to prevent electrical arcing from indirect lightning strikes or electrical faults, which poses a severe fire and explosion hazard. Because the bonding is missing at the rough-complete stage, the installation fails inspection.",
  "references": [
    "NEC 250.104(B)",
    "NEC 250.104"
  ]
}
